name: 学園アイドルマスター

detail.description:
A completely new addition to the “Idolmaster” series, the school idol training simulation “Gakumasu” is now available!
Let's make the budding idols who have various charms and problems shine with your production!

◆Introduction◆
The setting is Hatsei Academy, an idol training school.
You are a new student entering the producer department.
We scout unique idols who belong to the idol department and aim for their dreams,
Let's bloom their charm and grow them into idols through production!
